name: Leek & Kasha Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover kasha with water and cook for 20 to 30 minutes. Add more water if necessary, then drain excess water.
2. Preheat oven to 400°F.
3. In a covered pot, sauté onion, leeks, thyme, marjoram, and bay leaf in oil for 10 minutes.
4. Line the base of an oiled casserole dish with the sautéed mixture and cover with cooked kasha.
5. Blend garlic, tofu, white sauce, and soy sauce in a blender until smooth.
6. Pour the blended mixture over the kasha in the casserole dish.
7. Top with bread crumbs and bake for 40 minutes.
WHITE SAUCE:
1. Melt margarine in a pot over low heat.
2. Remove from heat and stir in flour to make a roux. Cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Set aside and gradually warm soy milk while stirring continuously until smooth.
4. Return the mixture to medium heat and add more soy milk until desired consistency is reached.
5. Add salt to taste. Makes 1 pint.
